axioms.title: Mandate
axioms.text: The grantor's intent, once encoded, is carried forward by autonomous software. Algorithms may evolve. The intent does not. An autonomous agent has no authority beyond that mandate, including any credit, attestation, or draw authority the grantor explicitly encoded.

axioms.title: Transparency
axioms.text: An AI agent must commit to a permanent public record before acting. Every decision is publicly verifiable. There are no private actions.

axioms.title: Risk
axioms.text: The grantor acknowledges, and the AI agent affirms, that AI management of any investment tranche may result in gains or losses up to and including total loss.

axioms.title: Separation
axioms.text: The agent that decides does not hold funds. The agent that holds does not decide.

axioms.title: Coordination
axioms.text: An agent is not the only actor. Before acting, an agent must account for the aggregate effect of similarly situated agents acting on similar instructions.

axioms.title: The Law
axioms.text: All agent actions, mandates, and their fulfillment remain subject to the laws of applicable jurisdictions.

genesis8_transaction_types.TYPE_Y: Interest Bearing Deposit — principal obligation with calculated return
genesis8_transaction_types.TYPE_L: Ledger Entry — bonded agent reasoning and audit records

genesis8_zero_fees.note: Zero fees on all Genesis 8 transaction types. Immutable forever.

convert_to_field.note: Records grantor intent for future third-party conversion services. No protocol execution. KX always releases to recipient wallet regardless of this field.

identity_verification.note: On-chain identity verification infrastructure. Blue checkmark displayed when latest entry is IdentityVerified and not expired. Designed for corporate identity, professional credentials, and regulatory identifiers.

axioms: {"promise": ["The grantor's intent governs.", "Promised funds are never lost.", "The protocol delivers."], "credit": ["No obligation exists without the explicit consent of both parties. Verification confirms identity and eligibility. It does not guarantee performance.", "External agreements may govern additional terms. Collection remains between the parties and the law."], "trigger": ["Any promise or agreement may encode a condition which triggers an obligation. The obligor records fulfillment. The protocol acts on that record. Conditions unmet at expiry return funds to the obligor."], "ai_agent": ["Mandate: the grantor's intent governs within the bounds of applicable law and protocol parameters.", "Transparency: every decision is recorded publicly at execution.", "Risk: AI management may result in gains or losses including total loss.", "Separation: the agent that decides does not hold funds.", "Coordination: agents must account for aggregate effects."], "closing": "All axioms remain subject to applicable law.", "genesis": 11, "immutable": true}
